original:
"Captain $playerName," the Excubitor Orbis nods, his voice gravelly.

His dark eyes take in the spacer's coffin carried by your entourage. You turn to give them a nod, and they set the coffin on the floor of the hangar.  

"Novice Bornanew," he says.
translated:
"Capitaine $playerName," l'Excubitor Orbis hoche la tête, sa voix rocailleuse.

Ses yeux sombres prennent en compte le cercueil de spacien porté par votre escorte. Vous vous retournez pour leur faire un signe, et ils posent le cercueil sur le sol du hangar.

"Novice Bornanew," dit-il.

original:
"Captain $playerName," the Excubitor Orbis nods, his voice gravelly.

His dark eyes take in the spacer's coffin carried by your entourage. You turn to give them a nod, and they set the coffin on the floor of the hangar.  

"Novice Bornanew," he says.

He seems to be ignoring Keepfaith entirely. For now.
translated:
"Capitaine $playerName," l'Excubitor Orbis hoche la tête, sa voix rocailleuse.

Ses yeux sombres prennent en compte le cercueil de spacien porté par votre escorte. Vous vous retournez pour leur faire un signe, et ils posent le cercueil sur le sol du hangar.

"Novice Bornanew," dit-il.

Il semble ignorer complètement Keepfaith. Pour l'instant.

original:
"Captain $playerName," the Excubitor Orbis nods, his voice gravelly.

His dark eyes take in Knight-Novice Bornanew beside you. He wears a light vac suit and bears his small satchel of possessions in one hand and the sample case with the false relic glove in the other. He insisted that he needed no help with it.

"Novice Bornanew," Oak says.
translated:
"Capitaine $playerName," l'Excubitor Orbis hoche la tête, sa voix rocailleuse.

Ses yeux sombres observent le Chevalier-Novice Bornanew à vos côtés. Il porte une combinaison spatiale légère et tient sa petite sacoche d'affaires dans une main et le conteneur d'échantillons avec le faux gant-relique dans l'autre. Il a insisté pour ne pas avoir besoin d'aide.

"Novice Bornanew," dit Oak.

original:
"Captain $playerName," the Excubitor Orbis nods, his voice gravelly.

His dark eyes take in the spacer's coffin carried by your entourage. You turn to give them a nod, and they set the coffin on the floor of the hangar.  

"Novice Bornanew," he says.
translated:
"Capitaine $playerName," l'Excubitor Orbis hoche la tête, sa voix rocailleuse.

Ses yeux sombres prennent en compte le cercueil de spacien porté par votre escorte. Vous vous retournez pour leur faire un signe, et ils posent le cercueil sur le sol du hangar.

"Novice Bornanew," dit-il.

original:
Gideon Oak shifts his stony gaze to you.

"Tell me how," he says.
translated:
Gideon Oak tourne son regard de pierre vers vous.

"Dites-moi comment," dit-il.

option_line: bffi_deliverToOakBodyHowA:"He died bravely. Confronting the traitor in the cathedral."
original: He died bravely. Confronting the traitor in the cathedral.
translated: Il est mort bravement. En affrontant la traîtresse dans la cathédrale.

option_line: bffi_deliverToOakBodyHowB:"One of your Knight-Captains lost control of his weapon."
original: One of your Knight-Captains lost control of his weapon.
translated: L'un de vos Chevaliers-Capitaines a perdu le contrôle de son arme.

option_line: bffi_deliverToOakBodyHowC:"If we'd done it my way, he'd still be alive."
original: If we'd done it my way, he'd still be alive.
translated: Si on avait fait à ma façon, il serait encore en vie.

original:
Keepfaith inhales as if she might speak, some righteous outburst, but falters. Her eyes fall back toward the ground.

The Excubitor Orbis takes in your comment, his face impassive as the stone this hangar was blasted from. His clerk's eyes are downcast.
translated:
Keepfaith inspire comme si elle allait parler, quelque éclat de vertu, mais se ravise. Ses yeux retombent vers le sol.

L'Excubitor Orbis absorbe votre commentaire, son visage impassible comme la pierre dont ce hangar a été creusé. Les yeux de sa greffière sont baissés.

original:
Is that a twitch of impatience on the impassive face of the Excubitor Orbis? But truly, the read is in his clerk; she almost cringes at the insufficiency of your answer.

Oak lets out a slow breath.

"So be it," he says, looking away as if you're no longer worth his time.
translated:
Est-ce un tic d'impatience sur le visage impassible de l'Excubitor Orbis ? Mais en vérité, c'est sa greffière qui trahit la réaction ; elle grimace presque devant l'insuffisance de votre réponse.

Oak laisse échapper un souffle lent.

"Qu'il en soit ainsi," dit-il, détournant le regard comme si vous ne méritiez plus son temps.
